visual_description: A man in a dark suit and tie is shown in a medium close-up, viewed from the side. He has short, dark hair and is looking off-camera with a serious expression. He holds a small, dark object, possibly a phone, to his ear. The background is dark and out of focus, with the faint blue glow of what appears to be computer screens visible behind him. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera remains steady, focusing on the man's profile. The audio opens with a man speaking in a low, urgent, and commanding tone, as if giving a critical instruction in a tense situation. He says, "泰国佬一出门口就抓人" (Once the Thais come out the door, arrest them). Immediately following his words, a low, suspenseful, and rhythmic electronic beat begins, creating a sense of urgency and impending action. The view cuts to a close-up of a digital display of numbers. Rows of blue, pixelated numbers are scrolling upwards against a black background.
